violations.text: The hand-washing sink by the front counter was blocked by a rolling cart and orders. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Rolling cart was moved during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils between uses shall be stored in one of the following manners: on a dry clean surface, in water with sufficient velocity to flush particulates to the drain, or in water that is maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or more. Utensils were cleaned and sanitized during the time of inspection and moved to a dry clean surface. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the back storage and ware washing areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the low boy door gaskets, and the fan guards of the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned at a frequency to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2024
The 3-bay sink was observed to be leaking from the wash compartment drain with a bucket to collect leaking water. Plumbing systems shall be kept in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
